name: Redwood Trust Inc. 10.00% Series A Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Redwood Trust Inc. 10.00% Series A Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a type of equity security issued by Redwood Trust, Inc. It pays a fixed dividend that may be reset in the future. Redwood Trust, Inc. is a specialty finance company that invests in residential and commercial mortgage-backed securities, as well as other real estate-related assets.
